'''Drone ore shuttles''' were used in the [[Empress Teta system/Legends|Koros system]] around [[5000 BBY/Legends|5000 BBY]]. They had no firepower, but had strong armor. Also they were equipped with [[Escape Repulsorchute|repulsor-chute]].

[[Jori Daragon]], while a prisoner on [[Ronika/Legends|Ronika]], stole one in order to find Empress [[Teta/Legends|Teta]] and warn her about the impending [[Great Hyperspace War/Legends|Sith invasion]].

{{Ship-stub}}

==Appearances==
*[[Tales of the Jedi – The Fall of the Sith Empire 2|''Tales of the Jedi – The Fall of the Sith Empire'' 2]] {{1st}}
